description: Letter In Judaeo-Arabic. Concerning communal controversy and politics. Mentions an apostate to Islam (al-posheaʿ), the community of Ṣahrajt, a ban of excommunication, a Jew who drank with the sender, someone who intended to denounce (יגמז) something to the government, a group of people referred to as "these pigs," and someone who asked the addressee for a "kitāb ʿināya" (some kind of letter of recommendation or document or support?), which must be denied to him. Abū Saʿīd Khallūf b. al-Ashqar is mentioned (also mentioned in the transcription for PGPID 4214, shelfmark currently unknown).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
